task.title: PHASE-B SC-01-T01 · 学生 P02 拍题 → presign + OSS PUT + wrongbook PENDING question + 跳 P03

audit_gate: audit.js v1 五维度严卡 · 用户红线: 真实测试不可妥协 · dim 5 spec_alignment DoR C-1..C-6 必过 (Playwright 真 sandbox 跑) · mock ≤ 5 · 数字对齐 · maxDiffPixels ≤ 500 · IT/E2E 接 sandbox 真容器 · 禁 H2/embedded/Mock 后端

context.scenario: PHASE-B SC-01 · TC-01.01 黄金路径起点 · 内嵌 TC-01.02 断点续传 + idempotency · 学生 P02 拍题 → presign + OSS PUT + wrongbook PENDING question + 跳 P03
context.page_state_machine: IDLE → FOCUSING → CAPTURED → UPLOADING → UPLOADED (→nav P03)
biz_refs: biz/业务与技术解决方案_AI错题本_基于日历系统.md §2B.2 步 1-4

acceptance_criteria.text: POST /api/file/presign · Header X-Idempotency-Key + body {sha256_hash, size, mime} → 200 {url, key, expiresIn}
同 X-Idempotency-Key 在 24h 内复用首次 file_key (TC-01.02 内嵌幂等)
POST /api/wb/questions · Header X-Idempotency-Key → 200 PENDING + qid · 三级幂等优先 (header > requestId > body)
POST /api/ai/analyze-by-url → 202 + taskId · FE 自动 router.push('/analyzing/{taskId}')
shutter UPLOADING 状态 aria-disabled='true' · 10 次连点只触发 1 次 presign
缺 X-Idempotency-Key 必返 400 ERR_IDEMPOTENCY_KEY_REQUIRED (不是 500)

test_invariants: TI1: 同 idemKey 24h 内 wb_file 仅 1 行
TI2: 缺 header 返 400 非 500
TI3: presign / PUT / wb-questions 任一 5xx 不得跳 P03
TI4: shutter UPLOADING 状态 10 连点 → presignCount === 1
key_invariants: 步骤 4 上传按 idempotency_key 不重复创建 question
context.frontend_setup: frontend/apps/h5 是 pnpm workspace · 先 corepack enable && corepack prepare pnpm@10 --activate · 然后 cd frontend && pnpm install · 启 dev: pnpm --filter @longfeng/h5 dev
context.backend_running_required: PHASE-A 已在 main 完成 5 service · 起对应 backend service: cd backend/<svc> && mvn spring-boot:run (Spring Boot 默认从 application.yml 读 sandbox endpoint · 已配 sandbox PG/Redis/MinIO)
context.anti_stub_gap_directive: 基于 PHASE-A 教训: 写代码前先 grep -rE 测试文件外部符号 + 现有源代码引用 一次性补齐
context.e2e_protocol: .harness/agents/SHARED-E2E-PROTOCOL.md DoR C-1..C-6 必须执行 · 12 张截图 (4 态×3类) · spec-trace.md · env-snapshot.md docker ps · run.log BUILD SUCCESS · 真 Playwright headed mode 跑 sandbox

physical_verification.rationale: PHASE-B 前端业务 task · 必须 Playwright headed E2E + 4 态截图 + DoR C-1..C-6 全过

deliverables_definition_of_done: 1. 前端 page 组件 + 状态机 (per spec.md §6) + testid (per spec.md)
2. API call (per primary_apis · 真 backend 端点)
3. Playwright spec.ts (frontend/apps/h5/tests/e2e/sc-01/<task-id>.spec.ts · trace 头 + 4 态)
4. 起 backend service (mvn spring-boot:run · sandbox 端口) + 起 frontend (pnpm dev)
5. 真 Playwright headed 跑 BUILD SUCCESS · 12 张截图 (idle/uploading/success/error × baseline/actual/diff)
7. coder.md (5 段落) + bugs-found.md (真 bug list)
8. git commits 分批 · hash 全部 git cat-file -e 验真
rule_6_tool_budget_guidance: PHASE-B 前端+E2E task · 复杂 · 预计 ~70-100 tool use · 过 50 自检 · 过 70 surface · 过 85 立即 Rule 6.5 compaction
